message:
feat(tui): add full-screen interactive TUI with multi-screen ops cockpit

New full-screen TUI application that replaces the headless console for
`am serve` when running in a TTY. Includes five screen tabs (dashboard,
timeline, messages, system health, inspector) with live data, verbosity
filtering, and graceful fallback to headless mode.

Server runtime (mcp-agent-mail-server):
- Add run_http_with_tui() entrypoint: HTTP server on background thread,
  ftui-based TUI on main thread, graceful shutdown coordination
- Add startup_checks module with pre-flight verification probes
- Add tui_app (MailAppModel): ftui Program model with screen tabs
- Add tui_chrome: status bar, tab bar, keybinding hints
- Add tui_poller: background DB polling thread for live stats + agent list
- Add tui_screens/: dashboard, timeline, messages, system_health, inspector
- Wire InstrumentedTool to emit ToolCallStart/ToolCallEnd events with
  masked params, duration, and per-table query deltas
- Emit HttpRequest events (skip /healthz) to TUI ring buffer
- Suppress duplicate console output when TUI is active
- Add detect_transport_mode() for dashboard display
- Add ftui-widgets workspace dependency

TUI event model (tui_events.rs):
- Add EventSeverity (Trace/Debug/Info/Warn/Error) with badge labels
- Add VerbosityTier (Minimal/Standard/Verbose/All) with cycling and filtering
- Derive severity from event kind (HTTP status-based, lifecycle-based)
- Add comprehensive tests for severity, verbosity, and serde roundtrips

TUI shared state (tui_bridge.rs):
- Fix duration_ms f64 conversion via u32 intermediate (avoid precision loss)
- Refactor test config to use struct update syntax

Config (mcp-agent-mail-core):
- Add tui_enabled field (default true, env TUI_ENABLED)

CLI (main.rs):
- Add --path, --transport (auto|mcp|api), and --no-tui flags to `serve`
- Add resolve_serve_http_path() with precedence: --path > --transport > HTTP_PATH > default /mcp/
- Add normalize_http_path() with preset recognition (mcp/api)
- Switch serve to call run_http_with_tui() instead of run_http()
- Add 8 unit tests for path resolution, transport, and flag parsing

Launcher script (scripts/am):
- Add --mcp, --api shorthand flags
- Add --no-tui flag
- Pass --path and --no-tui through to cargo run
- Change from HTTP_PATH env to --path CLI arg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ include_dir.workspace = true
 ftui.workspace = true
 ftui-extras.workspace = true
 ftui-runtime = { workspace = true, features = ["stdio-capture"] }
+ftui-widgets.workspace = true
 fastmcp.workspace = true
 fastmcp-core.workspace = true
 fastmcp-protocol.workspace = true

@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ Usage: am [serve] [options] [-- <extra args for `mcp-agent-mail serve`>]
 
 Convenience runner for local MCP Agent Mail development.
 Defaults:
-- HTTP_PATH=/mcp/
+- MCP transport path (`/mcp/`)
 - LOG_RICH_ENABLED=true
 - host=127.0.0.1, port=8765
 - loads HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN from ~/mcp_agent_mail/.env if not set
@@ -19,13 +19,18 @@ Options:
   --host <host>          Server host (default: 127.0.0.1)
   --port <port>          Server port (default: 8765)
   --path <mcp|api|/x/>   Base path (default: mcp)
+  --mcp                  Shortcut for --path mcp
+  --api                  Shortcut for --path api
   --env-file <path>      Env file for HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN (default: ~/mcp_agent_mail/.env)
   --no-auth              Unset HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN for this run
+  --no-tui               Disable interactive TUI (headless mode)
   -h, --help             Show help
 
 Examples:
+  scripts/am
   scripts/am serve
   scripts/am --path api
+  scripts/am --api
   scripts/am --host 0.0.0.0 --port 9000
 EOF
 }
@@ -71,6 +76,7 @@ port="8765"
 path_mode="mcp"
 env_file="${HOME}/mcp_agent_mail/.env"
 no_auth=0
+no_tui=0
 extra_args=()
 
 while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
@@ -87,6 +93,14 @@ while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
       path_mode="${2:-}"
       shift 2
       ;;
+    --mcp)
+      path_mode="mcp"
+      shift
+      ;;
+    --api)
+      path_mode="api"
+      shift
+      ;;
     --env-file)
       env_file="${2:-}"
       shift 2
@@ -95,6 +109,10 @@ while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
       no_auth=1
       shift
       ;;
+    --no-tui)
+      no_tui=1
+      shift
+      ;;
     -h|--help)
       usage
       exit 0
@@ -112,7 +130,7 @@ while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
   esac
 done
 
-export HTTP_PATH="$(normalize_http_path "$path_mode")"
+resolved_path="$(normalize_http_path "$path_mode")"
 export LOG_RICH_ENABLED="${LOG_RICH_ENABLED:-true}"
 
 if [[ "$no_auth" -eq 1 ]]; then
@@ -129,7 +147,12 @@ else
   fi
 fi
 
+tui_flag=()
+if [[ "$no_tui" -eq 1 ]]; then
+  tui_flag=(--no-tui)
+fi
+
 cd "$repo_root"
-echo "am: host=${host} port=${port} path=${HTTP_PATH} rich=${LOG_RICH_ENABLED}" >&2
+echo "am: host=${host} port=${port} path=${resolved_path} tui=$([[ "$no_tui" -eq 0 ]] && echo on || echo off) rich=${LOG_RICH_ENABLED}" >&2
 
-exec cargo run -p mcp-agent-mail -- serve --host "$host" --port "$port" "${extra_args[@]}"
+exec cargo run -p mcp-agent-mail -- serve --host "$host" --port "$port" --path "$resolved_path" "${tui_flag[@]}" "${extra_args[@]}"
